proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean age differs between patients assigned to treatment_pembrolizumab and those not assigned to treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Mean age is 64.2 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 63.8 off (t-test p=0.41).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The proportion of female patients differs between those assigned to treatment_pembrolizumab and those not assigned to treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Proportion female: 0.52 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.49 off (chi-square p=0.62).
